About Organization

National Insurance Company Limited is a leading insurance company in India. It was established in 1906 and is headquartered in Kolkata.
The company offers a range of insurance products, including life insurance, health insurance, and general insurance.

About the Programme

The NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for bachelor degree holders. The programme aims to recruit 500 assistants for National Insurance Company Limited.
The selection process will consist of a written exam and an interview. The exam will be conducted in two phases, with the first phase scheduled for 27 August 2026 and the second phase scheduled for 30 October 2026.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The National Insurance NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a great opportunity for bachelor degree holders to work with a leading insurance company in India. The selection process is competitive, but with proper preparation, candidates can increase their chances of getting selected.
The application fee is reasonable, and the exam dates are scheduled for August and October 2026. Candidates should read the official notification carefully and fill the online application form before the deadline.
